name: RS232SetSignalLine
title: RS232SetSignalLine
syntax: dword RS232SetSignalLine( dword port, dword line, dword state )
description: Sets signal lines on serial port.
If you use hardware handshake, then this function may conflict with the automatic handshaking.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: A number between 1 and 255 identifying a serial port.
